title: Gravitic polarization beam
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Citation}}
[[File:Gravitic_Polarization_Beam.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Dllr Nep]] and [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]] view the Gravitic polarization beam schematics.]]

The '''gravitic polarization beam''' was a molecular weapon. One was created by the [[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Kul Teska]] while another was the product of the [[Phantom Project]].

==Description==
The beam weapon disrupted matter on an atomic level, causing it to rip apart.

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Kul Teska]] developed such a weapon for [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. It was eventually [[Battle of Behpour|destroyed]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] at [[Behpour/Legends|Behpour]], where it had been installed to destroy the [[Naboo (star)/Legends|sun]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] along with the rest of the [[Naboo system/Legends|system]].<ref name="CCS">''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Republic Heroes]]''</ref>

It was also developed by Professor [[Rorax Falken]] and his students of [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy|Mrlsst Academy]] to serve as a method of relocating land, it was coveted for its military applications. During the era of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attempted to make use of this weapon through [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Loka Hask]]. While trying to capture the technology, his [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer]] was vaporized along with all information on the weapon when it created a [[Wormhole/Legends|hyperspace wormhole]].

*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Republic Heroes]]''
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 8|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 8]] {{1st}}
